summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 comprehensively. All required sections (hero, about, features, contact/footer) are present, navigable via a sticky navigation bar, and the dark charcoal + warm amber visual theme is applied consistently with hover interactions, sans-serif typography, and card shadows. Both requirements are fully satisfied with no missing elements detected.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration (useInternetIdentity hook, InternetIdentityProvider, useActor hook)
hallucinated_features.reason: User authentication or login functionality was explicitly listed as a non-goal in the build request, yet a full Internet Identity auth flow with hooks and provider wrapping the app was implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: Contact form with submission handling and success state
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a contact form; only placeholder contact info and copyright text were required for the contact/footer section.
